color_mappings.deep_void_black: Sub-60Hz sine, zero reverb, absolute silence gaps
color_mappings.neon_cyan: High-freq FM, fast LFO, shimmering delays
color_mappings.industrial_rust: Bitcrushed noise, distortion at 400Hz, metallic resonance
color_mappings.ultraviolet_purple: Phrygian melodies, deep cathedral reverb, spectral smearing

synesthesia_v3.visual_prompting: When using image__create_image, match hex-codes to frequency bands.
